farmer_questions: Why are we getting less than 500 rupees for bhaji?
Why is there not too much cut?
Why are they increasing the rate for the goods ten times?
Why are they not living up to their promises?
Why is the government rate for the goods being given to the private ones?
Why are the private rooms very dirty and require extra fees to clean?
Why are the government rate and the government-acquired private malls a problem for the poor?
